title: Companion — A Parasite Archaeology
medium: catalogue of bolt-ons that became the brand — eight cases across architecture and software. each card is a schematic diagram + a verdict (portrait / canon / iconic). the attachment and the year are what matter.
caption: The feature added in year five is the feature the thing is known for by year fifty. Viollet-le-Duc's spire, Slack's threads, Figma's cursors — the parasites graduate to portraits.
